reasoning: High packet loss on the E2 uplink path (O-DU to Near-RT RIC) causing a ripple effect on the other interfaces (F1-u and A1) and the rest of the network components (O-CU and Near-RT RIC).
actionable_steps: Inspect the E2 interface configuration and the physical/virtual link between the O-DU and the Near-RT RIC for packet drops or congestion. Check for any misconfigurations in the E2AP signaling or transport layer (SCTP) issues.
